name: Hearts of Palm and Zucchini Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the drained hearts of palm, garlic, jalapeno vinegar, salt, pepper, olive oil, zucchini, tomato, and onion in a large bowl.
2. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
4. Spoon the salad onto a bed of mixed lettuce.
Note: You can substitute the liquid from a jar of pickled jalapeno for the Jalapeno vinegar.
